name: Oyster and Plantation Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 pint fresh shucked oysters, in their liquor
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the seasoning mix ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Dissolve the flour in 2 tablespoons of the chicken stock.
3. Melt butter in a heavy 5-quart pot over high heat until it sizzles.
4. Add the onions and plantains to the pot, stirring constantly until the onions begin to brown and the plantains are tender (about 8 minutes).
5. Add the remaining chicken stock and deglaze the pot by scraping up any brown bits from the bottom.
6. Stir in the seasoning mix, flour-stock mixture, and coconut milk. Mix well.
7. Add the heavy cream and bring the soup to a gentle boil, stirring constantly.
8. Gently add the oysters and their liquor, return to a simmer, reduce heat to medium, and cook until the oysters are heated through (about 3 minutes).
9. Remove from heat and serve.
